report.summary: Low-delta cycle: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28. Publish queue emptied (4→0 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES). 83 uncommitted files (+4 from v3). 141 TS errors stable. Day 8 deploy gap since batch deploy Mar 25.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28 (Apr 1 build fix) — no new commits this cycle
1,244 page.tsx files on disk — unchanged from v3
630 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES — stable

PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty (was 4 in v3): euler-v2-modular-lending, hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability, crypto-staking-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026 all promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES in working tree

141 TS errors across 4 files — STABLE: structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical example file), lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true)
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx — long-standing debt, unchanged
Production build test failed in sandbox (bus error / OOM) — environment limitation, not code regression. Build config uses 8GB heap + ignoreBuildErrors

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present with route.ts files: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s)
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers verified on all 6 routes — config unchanged from v3
Rate limiter coverage still 2/6 (prices + trending only) — 4 routes unprotected. Persistent gap
Fallback data: prices route has graceful stale-cache fallback on CoinGecko failure. defi-yields still returns 500 on DefiLlama failure — persistent P1
Health endpoint at /api/health operational with rate limiting (100 req/min) and service health checks
External APIs: CoinGecko (prices, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance), Alternative.me (fear-greed, market-metrics), DefiLlama (defi-yields)
Cannot verify live API responses — sandbox egress blocks degen0x.com and upstream API domains

sections.title: DevOps
items: Deploy gap: 8 days since batch deploy Mar 25 (21aaf5b). Last commit Apr 1 (3b2dd28) — committed but likely not deployed
83 uncommitted files (+4 from v3's 79): 17 modified tracked, 66 untracked
Vercel project confirmed: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 (team_crOFt5ZIDYkZ8TXrZubTK8qj)
Build config stable: 8GB memory, standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors=true, concurrency=4
4 publish queue pages promoted in working tree — need commit+push to deploy
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard or live deployment state from sandbox

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Cycle output: 0 new commits. Publish queue cleared (4 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES in working tree)
New build content this cycle: crypto-staking-guide-2026 + flash-loans-defi-guide-2026 scaffolded and added to PUBLISHED_PAGES
Carry-over (persistent): 83 uncommitted files, 109 missing page.tsx slugs, 4/6 API routes unprotected, defi-yields fallback gap
Time-sensitive content: Ethereum Pectra upgrade ~8 days (Apr 10), US tax deadline ~13 days (Apr 15) — guides exist but remain undeployed
Blockers for Jefe: (1) Commit+push overdue — 83-file backlog growing, 8-day deploy gap, (2) All publish queue pages promoted but won't be live until deployed
